title: node.invoke allowed untrusted system.run approval fields to bypass exec approvals
description: The node.invoke handler in nodes.ts only sanitizes parameters when the command is exactly 'system.run', passing all other commands' parameters through unmodified. An attacker can invoke a node command that is not 'system.run' but still carries system.run-style approval fields in its params, which are forwarded to the node without sanitization. This allows untrusted approval fields to bypass the exec approval manager and achieve unauthorized command execution on the target node.
